seo.title: Building Content Generation with Smolagents + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build content generation with Smolagents + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Smolagents simplifies building lightweight AI agents for tasks like content generation using Hugging Face models and code-based reasoning. For content creation workflows enforcing brand voice, factual accuracy, and SEO guidelines, guardrails are essential to prevent hallucinations, off-brand tone, or plagiarized output. Vex integration wraps agent execution to verify outputs against critical criteria, ensuring reliable, production-ready content.

architectureOverview.heading: Content Generation Architecture with Smolagents
architectureOverview.description:
The typical Smolagents content generation architecture starts with a user prompt defining topic, length, and brand guidelines. A lightweight agent, powered by a code interpreter and LLM like Llama or Mistral, generates draft content using tools for research (web search, fact APIs) and SEO analysis. The agent iterates through planning, drafting, fact-checking, and polishing phases, leveraging Smolagents' simple run() loop for multi-step reasoning.

Key components include custom tools for brand voice scoring, plagiarism checks via APIs like Copyleaks, and editorial validators. The agent maintains state across steps to compound reasoning, but lacks native error handling, making Vex verification crucial for catching unsafe code generation or reasoning drift. Output is a finalized article ready for publishing.

This setup excels in simplicity but risks compounding errors in multi-step workflows, where early factual inaccuracies propagate through editing.

risks.name: Brand Voice Drift
risks.description: Agent generates content deviating from specified tone (e.g., formal brand outputs casual slang)
risks.mitigation: Vex semantic verification against brand voice embeddings

risks.name: Factual Hallucinations
risks.description: Multi-step reasoning compounds false facts from initial research errors
risks.mitigation: Real-time fact-checking integration with Vex knowledge verification

risks.name: Unsafe Code Generation
risks.description: Code agent generates dangerous exec() calls during content processing
risks.mitigation: Vex code safety scanning before execution

risks.name: SEO Non-Compliance
risks.description: Generated content ignores keyword density, readability scores
risks.mitigation: Vex regex and metric-based SEO validation

vexIntegration.title: Basic Vex Verification Wrapper
vexIntegration.description: Wrap agent.run() with comprehensive content verification
vexIntegration.code:
from smolagents import CodeAgent
import vex

agent = CodeAgent(model='meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct')

@ vex.verify(
    checks=[
        'brand_consistency:professional',
        'factual_accuracy>0.9',
        'tone_adherence:formal',
        'seo_compliance'
    ]
)
def safe_content_generation(prompt: str):
    return agent.run(prompt)

verified_content = safe_content_generation('Write B2B AI blog post')
print(verified_content)

vexIntegration.title: Risk-Specific Guardrails
vexIntegration.description: Targeted verification for Smolagents failure modes in content workflows
vexIntegration.code:
import vex
from smolagents import CodeAgent

agent = CodeAgent(model='meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct')

@ vex.verify(
    checks=[
        'no_exec_code',  # Block unsafe Python
        'reasoning_coherence',
        'brand_voice:enterprise',
        'plagiarism_score<0.1',
        'readability>flesch_60'
    ],
    risk_profile='medium'
)
def secure_content_agent(prompt: str):
    raw_output = agent.run(prompt)
    return raw_output

content = secure_content_agent('Generate marketing whitepaper on AI security')
print(content)

vexIntegration.title: Production Monitoring Integration
vexIntegration.description: Add observability and auto-retry for failed verifications
vexIntegration.code:
import vex
from smolagents import CodeAgent

agent = CodeAgent(model='meta-llama/Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct')

@vex.verify(
    checks=[
        'factual_accuracy',
        'brand_consistency',
        'seo_compliance',
        'originality>0.9'
    ],
    max_retries=3,
    monitor=True
)
def production_content_pipeline(topic: str, brand_guidelines: str):
    prompt = f'{topic}\nGuidelines: {brand_guidelines}'
    return agent.run(prompt)

# Production usage
final_content = production_content_pipeline(
    'Cloud security trends 2025',
    'Professional B2B tone, 800 words, 3 SEO keywords'
)
print(final_content)

cta.heading: Secure Your Smolagents Content Generation
cta.description: Install Vex today with `pip install vex-sdk` and wrap your agents for production-ready content generation.
